Explore the Art

Toile Blanche

The Artistic Escape to Saint-Paul-de-Vence. Experience the boutique hotel and restaurant where the Leroy Brothers' aesthetic comes to life through soulful hospitality.

Book Your Stay

TB Contemporary

The Art Experience The bridge between the two. Discover the on-site art space, curated exhibitions and sculpture park. The artistic soul that defines the Toile Blanche estate.

Discover the Art Space

Toile Blanche is the intersection of creativity and soulful hospitality, created by Leroy Brothers.

More than a destination, it is a living artistic concept where guests and art lovers engage in an immersive dialogue with contemporary art. Set within a legendary Mediterranean retreat, every encounter is designed to inspire, blending the avant-garde spirit of the artists with the timeless ease of Saint-Paul-de-Vence.

© 2026 Leroy Brothers

Saint-Paul-de-Vence, France
